methodology.date_method: Execution Start through Execution End, prorated by inclusive execution days per calendar month
methodology.display_method: Toggleable: blended mode converts display/DRP/PDQ pack sizes to equivalent regular cases; separate mode keeps display/DRP rows separate and counts each as 1 case
methodology.product_level: MPG pack-size level from Product List; individual flavours are combined
methodology.market_mapping: Retailer/customer names are mapped from Market List.xlsx
methodology.mom_comparison: MoM compares the July pull against the June pull from DR 07 July - MoM.xlsx using the same product, market, status, date, and display-conversion methodology
